<@183782216353054720> Hello! I hope it's ok for me to @ you <:aurita_beg2:1407642015428116541> 
Is there any difference between the GDoc of important terms linked in your GitHub and the one in <#1402537664619479103>? I have to admit I feel a little overwhelmed by the official one so I would be happy if I can use yours as a reference instead
yes, the one linked in Mercy's github is an older version - use the most recent term base posted in <#1402537664619479103> as that is the updated version
terms are very important to keep consistent so it's best to ensure you're using the latest version
Noted! I'll update that when I can today.
